posts.text: A bill before Congress would amend the COINS Act, which restricts American investment in sensitive technologies abroad, to include licensing Chinese biotech. posts.text: I spend a few times more on tech hardware, than I spend on gasoline each year. Why isn’t Trump focused on this source of inflation instead?? When will we release the strategic DRAM reserves??🤭
